findings.problem: The chapter tells us Mallick has already solved the case, but the inferential click is mostly summarized rather than dramatized. The opening names evidence and says the twelve-page correction grid exists, yet it never makes locally legible how those corrections exclude the other four men and point uniquely to Tommy, so the detective-method payoff lands as assertion instead of as a climax the reader can feel happening on the page.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rework snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:5, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:9, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:11, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:13, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:131 so Mallick's solved-state is conveyed through one or two concrete inferential bridges inside the live scene: which correction actually mattered, why it belongs to Martin's natural-death tampering rather than Cliff's homicide, and what fact makes Tommy the only man whose motive and dock exposure line up. Keep Tommy's 6 AM arrival as the chapter engine instead of replacing it with a longer recap.
findings.acceptance_test: By the time the revised chapter reaches snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:19, a cold reader can state one decisive correction-grid inference and one Tommy-specific fact that make Mallick's certainty legible. If the reader still has to take 'She had the case' on trust, or cannot say why the other four men are excluded, this passage fails.

findings.problem: The chapter's final emblematic object breaks continuity in three ways at once: the draft board is described as having twelve columns in a seven-man league, Martin is placed fourth from the left instead of in the final slot, and the red circles are attributed to an unknown mourner even though canon establishes that Martin circled his own picks. Because this image is the chapter's closing symbolic frame, the contradiction is highly visible rather than incidental.
findings.rewrite_direction: Correct snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:219 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:221 so the board matches canon on all three points: seven owner columns with eighteen rounds, Martin in the final slot, and the red circles either explicitly Martin's or described without contradictory speculation. Preserve the quiet-endgame function of the image while aligning it to the established object state.
findings.acceptance_test: Reading the revised text at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:219 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:221, a reviewer can verify all three facts on the page: seven-man board, Martin in the final slot, red circles originating with Martin. Any line that places Martin elsewhere, implies someone else circled the picks, or leaves twelve columns in place fails.

findings.problem: The confession scene avoids stiff full-form diction, but it still defaults to composed mini-narratives. Under maximum pressure Tommy delivers a clean, chronologically tidy report with finished images and very little restarting, contradiction, or verbal skid, so the dominant sub-mode is polished confessional mini-speech rather than messy spoken-through panic.
findings.rewrite_direction: Roughen snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:63, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:73, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:77, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:81, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:93, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:97 so Tommy keeps the physical specifics but sounds more like a cornered Tommy in the style bible: aborted starts, self-corrections, repeated words with shifting emphasis, and at least one place where Mallick has to cut back through the answer to get the next fact.
findings.acceptance_test: In revised snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:63 through snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:97, Tommy still communicates the shove, the shallow-water struggle, the hold-down, and the shoe-staging, but at least three answers now show a pressure fracture (restart, self-correction, abandoned clause, or repeated wording that shifts meaning) and at least one answer requires a follow-up because he does not deliver it in one clean pass.

findings.problem: From Mallick's first question through most of Tommy's confession, the chapter runs a long sequence of external-only single-paragraph beats before Mallick gets another real interior beat at line 103. In a Mallick POV chapter, that long exterior stretch flattens the scene toward transcript and weakens the close-third pressure that the style bible calls for.
findings.rewrite_direction: Seed brief Mallick-only calibrations into snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:39, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:51, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:57, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:71, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:87, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:103: what detail she clocks in Tommy's body, what answer confirms or sharpens the case, or what the room's sound and smell do to her concentration. Keep the insertions short and analytic so the scene stays under pressure rather than becoming procedural commentary.
findings.acceptance_test: Between revised snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:39 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:103, there is no run longer than eight consecutive paragraphs without a Mallick interior cue, and each inserted cue changes the reader's understanding of either Tommy's confession or Mallick's control of the interview. Mere stage direction does not count.

summary: Fails across all four lenses. The chapter has real assets - the murder confession is physically specific and the quiet aftermath has useful texture - but the detective-resolution payoff is still asserted more than dramatized, Tommy's confession stays too orderly for his pressure register, Mallick's POV goes externally flat for too long in the central scene, and the final draft-board image breaks established continuity at the exact moment it is supposed to close the book's symbolic frame.
